connections.when: Auditing memory for token waste or context bloat
connections.yields: Waste pattern detection, size thresholds, audit procedure

connections.when: Verifying memory content is not duplicated in skills/instructions
Enforcing structure and anti-drift rules in memory files
connections.yields: Anti-drift patterns, living document maintenance rules

connections.when: Memory audit results feed overall architecture health assessment
connections.yields: Health dimension data for cognitive architecture diagnosis

connections.when: Scanning /memories/ during meditation for cross-project patterns and skill candidates
connections.yields: Pattern abstraction, generalization rules, promotion criteria

connections.when: Pattern in /memories/ reaches skill-candidate threshold (3+ repos)
connections.yields: Skill creation procedure, trifecta scaffolding, quality gates
